headline: Has Fidelity National Information Services (FIS) Fallen Too Far After Its 34.5% One-Year Slide?
summary: Wondering if Fidelity National Information Services is now priced for a rebound or still has risks baked into the share price? This article unpacks what the current valuation actually reflects. The stock closed at US$47.60, with returns of a 3.3% decline over 7 days, 0.3% over 30 days, a 27.5% decline year to date, and a 34.5% decline over the past year. This performance has reshaped how many investors see its risk and reward trade off. Recent coverage has focused on how payment technology...
